appDesc.message: One-tap transfer of code from Claude, ChatGPT, or Gemini into the p5.js Web Editor and more. Great for vibe coding.

ctxSend.message: p5.js Relay: transfer selection to destination

tipApply.message: Transfer to the default destination editor (p5.js Relay)

errNoRule.message: No destination registered. Please add one on the options page.

errCanvasExtract.message: Could not extract code from the Canvas panel.

errEditorNotFound.message: Editor not found (type: $TYPE$, selector: $SEL$). Try setting the type to "auto" in options.

optClearBefore.message: Replace existing code when applying (append to the end if off)

msgNeed.message: Name and URL pattern are required

msgHttp.message: URL pattern must start with https:// — $NAME$

helpBody.message:
URL pattern is used to find an already-open tab (e.g. https://editor.p5js.org/*). If none is found, "URL to open" is opened.

Editor type selects how code is pasted: auto (recommended), codemirror5, codemirror6, monaco, ace, textarea, contenteditable. "auto" detects the editor automatically, so it keeps working even when a site migrates editors (like the p5.js Web Editor's CodeMirror 5→6 migration).

Split files: when on, a single HTML file generated by Gemini Canvas etc. is split into index.html / style.css / sketch.js (inline <style> → style.css, inline <script> → sketch.js, library <script src> tags stay in index.html), and each part is applied to the matching file tab of the destination editor.

opModeNotice.message: p5.js Relay: This code needs additional libraries. Please switch this sketch to HTML/CSS/JS mode (SKETCH panel > MODE), then transfer again.

aboutGithubDesc.message: Report bugs or send pull requests on the GitHub repository.
